nasb.text: These are those who were numbered by Moses and Eleazar the priest, who numbered the sons of Israel in the plains of Moab by the Jordan at Jericho.

esv.text: These were those listed by Moses and Eleazar the priest, who listed the people of Israel in the plains of Moab by the Jordan at Jericho.

cnv.text: 以上的人就是被摩西和以利亞撒祭司數點的；他們是在摩押平原，耶利哥對面約旦河邊數點以色列人的。

ccb.text: 以上是摩西和以利亚撒祭司在约旦河边、耶利哥对面的摩押平原统计的人数，
